summary: V3 Engine 4 Improvements testing complete. 14/14 tests passed. All features verified: (1) n2_signal enriched context object with passed/trigger_level/interaction_quality/trigger_zscore/trigger_delta_ratio fields, (2) OFI EMA 20s in context.ofi_fast (smoothed float), (3) Welford Global Seed working (10/11 accumulators have n>3), (4) TRANSICAO R:R filter showing in reason string with distance vs threshold.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ nivel_2 contains n2_signal object with all required fields
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2 contains same n2_signal structure
✅ n2_signal.passed is boolean, trigger_level is string, interaction_quality is string
✅ N3 reason references N2 context (e.g., 'N2: NO_REJECTION at vah')
✅ context.ofi_fast is EMA 20s (smoothed float in range [-1, 1])
✅ OFI Fast is smoothed (float type, not raw integer)
✅ Welford stats collection has 11 accumulators, 10 with n > 3 (warm)
✅ TRANSICAO R:R filter fields present in nivel_2 (passed, interaction_quality, reason)
✅ R:R filter mentioned in reason string: 'R:R: 56.83 vs min 28.42 (OK)'
✅ interaction_quality valid values per regime (NO_REJECTION, BULLISH_ACCEPTANCE, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: n2_signal object correctly passes enriched context from N2 to N3 - N3 no longer re-analyzes DZ levels
OFI EMA 20s computed via _compute_ofi_ema_20s() using time-windowed approach (last 20 seconds)
Welford Global Seed working: 10/11 accumulators have n>3 from historical snapshots
TRANSICAO R:R filter correctly blocks when |price-POC| < 1.5×ATR_M5 with RR_UNVIABLE quality
N3 reason string correctly references N2 context (trigger_level, Z-score, interaction_quality)

test_credentials.note: Auth not required for V3 signal endpoints (public API)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Engine 4 improvements fully tested. Key features: (1) n2_signal object in nivel_2 with passed/trigger_level/interaction_quality/trigger_zscore/trigger_delta_ratio - N3 uses this instead of re-analyzing DZ. (2) context.ofi_fast is EMA 20s (time-windowed, not count-based). (3) Welford Global Seed from snapshots working (10/11 accumulators warm with n>3). (4) TRANSICAO R:R filter: if |price-POC| < 1.5×ATR_M5, interaction_quality=RR_UNVIABLE and passed=False. MongoDB welford_stats has 11 accumulators. Snapshots store dz_n2/dz_n3 data.

feature_verification.n2_signal_enriched_context: Working - all 5 fields present (passed, trigger_level, interaction_quality, trigger_zscore, trigger_delta_ratio)
feature_verification.welford_global_seed: Working - 10/11 accumulators have n>3 from historical snapshots
feature_verification.transicao_rr_filter: Working - R:R distance vs threshold shown in reason string
feature_verification.n3_uses_n2_signal: Working - N3 reason references N2 context (e.g., 'N2: NO_REJECTION at vah')
feature_verification.cross_symbol_validation: Working - MES has same n2_signal structure as MNQ

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints use real DataBento data and MongoDB.
